title: A simpler way to participate in ICP governance
content: This app focuses on a clearer staking and voting experience, with fewer steps and better visibility into proposals and rewards. More improvements to governance flows and insights are coming soon.
toast: Welcome! Start by locking ICP to participate in governance.
